item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-10 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+53 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: Machine Learning Engineering Open Book Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +53，前 3 日均值 7.3，加速度 7.2x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] google-ai-edge/mediapipe (+35 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: Cross-platform, customizable ML solutions for live and streaming media. Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +35，前 3 日均值 11.7，加速度 3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] ChatGPTNextWeb/NextChat (+21 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: ✨ Light and Fast AI Assistant. Support: Web | iOS | MacOS | Android | Linux | Windows Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +21，前 3 日均值 7，加速度 3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules (+30 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A curated collection of .mdc configuration files that customize Cursor AI editor behavior for specific frameworks, libraries, and workflows. Why it matters: The repo has 39,842 stars and is accelerating sharply: 30 stars in the last 24 hours, 125 in the last 7 days, with a 7-day average of 16 stars/day and a 3-day average of 10.7 stars/day. The acceleration ratio of 2.8 (high) and the 'sudden_breakout' trend type indicate a recent spike in attention, likely driven by the growing adoption of Cursor AI and the need for project-specific rules. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'AI configuration as a shared asset' — teams are treating AI behavior as something that can be version-controlled, reviewed, and optimized just like code. Expect more curated rule collections and possibly a marketplace for AI editor rules. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] Tencent/ncnn (+10 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: ncnn is a high-performance neural network inference framework optimized for the mobile platform Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +10，前 3 日均值 4.3，加速度 2.3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] addyosmani/agent-skills (+3421 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +3421，前 3 日均值 1120.3，加速度 3.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1042 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1042，总 stars 53,822，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+974 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +974，总 stars 36,118，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] nexu-io/open-design (+742 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 The open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Local-first desktop app. 🖼️ Your coding agent becomes the design engine: prototypes, landing pages, dashboards, slides, images & video — real files, HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export. 🤖 Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen & 20+ CLIs via BYOK. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +742，前 3 日均值 346.7，加速度 2.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI (+3007 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +3007，前 3 日均值 998，加速度 1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+1862 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1862，总 stars 55,036，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] HKUDS/nanobot (+72 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +72，前 3 日均值 33.7，加速度 2.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
